title: MQTT Event Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for all MQTT message payloads in the traffic control system.

SensorEntry.description: Published on traffic/sensor/{side}/entry when a vehicle enters the detection zone.

side.description: Road side the vehicle entered from.

vehicle_id.description: Unique identifier assigned by CV for this vehicle track.

SensorExit.description: Published on traffic/sensor/{side}/exit when a vehicle exits the detection zone.

side.description: Road side the vehicle exited from.

vehicle_id.description: Unique identifier assigned by CV for this vehicle track.

SensorMidzone.description: Published on traffic/sensor/midzone every 1s with current midzone occupancy.

vehicles_in_zone.description: List of vehicle_ids currently tracked inside the midzone.

stuck_ids.description: Subset of vehicles_in_zone that have been stationary beyond the stuck threshold.

StatePhase.description: Published on traffic/state/phase on every phase change and every 1s as a heartbeat.

phase_started_at.description: Unix timestamp when the current phase began.

phase_will_end_at.description: Unix timestamp when the current phase is expected to end, or null if open-ended.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the current phase (e.g. 'adaptive', 'timer', 'override').

StateQueues.description: Published on traffic/state/queues every 500ms with current queue lengths and wait times.

queue_A.description: Number of vehicles queued on side A.

queue_B.description: Number of vehicles queued on side B.

wait_A_sec.description: Estimated wait time in seconds for the head of queue A.

wait_B_sec.description: Estimated wait time in seconds for the head of queue B.

StateMetrics.description: Published on traffic/state/metrics every 1s with aggregated performance metrics.

avg_delay_A.description: Rolling average vehicle delay in seconds for side A.

avg_delay_B.description: Rolling average vehicle delay in seconds for side B.

max_queue_A.description: Maximum queue length observed on side A in the current session.

max_queue_B.description: Maximum queue length observed on side B in the current session.

throughput_per_hour.description: Extrapolated vehicle throughput per hour based on recent data.

unsafe_switches.description: Count of phase switches that occurred while the midzone was not clear.

EventLog.description: Published on traffic/event/log for notable system events.

code.description: Machine-readable event code (e.g. STUCK_VEHICLE, COMM_LOSS, PHASE_CHANGE).

data.description: Arbitrary structured context for the event.

CmdOverride.description: Published on traffic/cmd/override by the Web UI operator to force a phase.

operator.description: Identifier of the operator issuing the override.

CmdScenario.description: Published on traffic/cmd/scenario to start a named demo scenario.

scenario_id.description: Identifier of the scenario to run (see scenarios.md).

mode.description: Control mode to use during the scenario.
